ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (HOME or AWAY) */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (WIN or LOSS) */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus of the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the game data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6'2") */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the player data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "seconds_played" INTEGER /* Total seconds played by the player in the game */,
  "made_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player */,
  "attempted_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player */,
  "made_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals made by the player */,
  "attempted_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals attempted by the player */,
  "made_free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player */,
  "attempted_free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds by the player */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of defensive rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls by the player */,
  "game_score" REAL /* Game score of the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds (offensive + defensive) */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the game statistic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team */,
  "mvp_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Most Valuable Player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_mvp_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("mvp_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_teams" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-level game statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus of the game for the team */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the team */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage of the team */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the team */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Total personal fouls by the team */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the team-level game statistic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_teams_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
